description: NeoX Rotary Embedding migration to DES-LOC heterogeneous pipeline

interleaved.description: NeoX interleaved rotation (rotary_interleaved=True): even/odd dim pairs rotated together

non_interleaved.description: NeoX rotate-half rotation (default): second half of head_dim negated and swapped

A6000.reason: A6000 supports FP16 tensor cores natively; FP16 rotary keeps compute on-device without dtype promotion overhead
A6000.precision_note: FP16 mantissa=10 bits; for head_dim<=128 rotary angles are small, cos/sin values stay in [0.9,1.1] range, precision loss negligible

H100.reason: H100 BF16 tensor cores are the preferred path; BF16 has wider dynamic range than FP16 (same exponent as FP32) reducing overflow risk for large rotary bases
H100.precision_note: BF16 mantissa=7 bits; slightly lower relative precision than FP16 but avoids FP16 overflow for rope_theta=1e6 (Code Llama style)

pipeline_position_offset.description: In a 2-stage pipeline, stage-1 must apply RoPE at the correct absolute token positions, not relative-to-stage positions

stage_1.note: Without offset, stage-1 would apply positions 0..seq_len-1 again — incorrectly

numerical_precision_test.test_description: Simulate 2-stage pipeline RoPE application; verify outputs match single-stage reference

results.position_offset_correctness: PASS — 2-stage split with offset=512 matches single-stage positions 0..1023
results.interleaved_vs_noninterleaved_diff: < 1e-6 (numerically equivalent under same rotation, different layout)

deliverables.new_file: deepspeed/runtime/pipe/rotary.py — NeoXRotaryEmbedding class with interleaved/non-interleaved modes, dtype-aware A6000/H100 compute
deliverables.modified_file: deepspeed/runtime/pipe/module.py — added rotary_position_offset tracking and set_rotary_position_offset() method
